description: Product Description PACK OF 80 SQUISHY - BONNYCO Pack of 80 adorable Squishies to squeeze endlessly - no duplicates and individually bagged! These squishies toys comes in party bag fillers for kids that are ready made to give , so you won't have to spend time preparing them, we do it for you! They are very original to give as party favours kids at different events such as birthdays, communions, weddings, Valentine's Day, or end of term. They are also ideal pinata filler, in advent calendars, Christmas stocking fillers kids or even Easter eggs. The bags are opaque and you can't see what's inside, so finding out which of the 80 different squishies they've got will be super exciting. Surprise both boys and girls with these squishies that are sure to delight them and make them have a great time - you'll be the best host ever! In addition, the 80 squishies come in a handy plastic box, meaning it’s also perfect as a unique gift for girls birthday presents, boys birthday gifts as Christmas. What squishies does this set contain? No duplicates! The set contains 40 different squishies in 2 colours each. There’s a wide variety of different squishies. You might find unicorns, dinosaurs, suns, stars and lots of animals: lion, penguin, oyster, octopus, sloth, crab, crocodile, whale, elephant, seahorse, rabbit, hedgehog, duck, dolphin, hippopotamus and many more! Box with 80 different squishies, perfect as a gift for any occasion. Why choose BONNYCO pack of 80 SQUISHIES? Super practical box Surprise kids at a birthday party with this special gift. The 80 squishies come in a handy container box to store your squishies and to take them everywhere you go. Ready-to-deliver bags The mochi squishy toys come ready-made in opaque bags , so what's inside will remain a secret until they get opened - find out which of the 80 squishies you've won! Hours of entertainment They won't be able to stop squeezing, stretching and squishing these cute squishies. Their soft, non-sticky feel and fluffiness are irresistible - they're so cute! Easy to clean The squishies can be easily cleaned with soap and water. Sprinkle talcum powder on them after washing and drying to restore their softness. They will be as good as new and perfect for further play. Relaxing effect Squishies can be very useful for relieving stress, reducing anxiety and increasing concentration by giving you something to fidget with. They help to avoid bad habits while working or studying, such as nail biting, finger crunching or nibbling pens. Effective for children and adults. Nice packaging for gift giving The plastic box with the squishies is packaged in beautifully crafted packaging that makes it perfect as party bag fillers for Christmas and boys gifts for girls. Lovely squishies that children can use to learn about animals and colours, develop their imagination, improve their active participation, social skills, sharing and much, much more. These squishies are a great gift that will appeal to both young and old alike. See below for more of our BONNYCO products for birthday parties!
